overall.description: A cinematic video game scene depicting a rainy night in a suburban neighborhood. The camera follows a woman in a white dress walking along a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees and street lamps, with occasional vehicles passing on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential sidewalk in heavy rain

events.description: Yellow sedan drives past on the wet road from left to right
Camera approaches a pedestrian figure walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: moving along the sidewalk through the rain, approaching the figure ahead

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan driving past on the wet road with headlights on

entered.detail: single-story homes with warm illuminated windows
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk with wet fronds
ornate black street lamp post casting light through the rain
asphalt road surface reflecting street lights in the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy suburban night with the camera moving along a sidewalk. Street lamps illuminate the wet pavement and palm trees line the path. A yellow car drives past on the road as the camera approaches a figure walking ahead in the distance.

events.description: Camera catches up to the woman and begins following closely behind her
Rain appears to intensify, becoming more visible in the street lamp glow

agents.ego_description: the woman in the white dress walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing the blue mailbox and continuing through the rain

entered.detail: USPS blue postal collection box on the sidewalk
low red brick wall with concrete cap and planter boxes
vehicles parked along the street curb with headlights visible in distance

segments.scene_description: The camera catches up to a woman in a white dress and follows her along the rainy sidewalk. They pass a blue mailbox and continue past a brick retaining wall. The rain intensifies under the street lamps as they move deeper into the residential neighborhood.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy suburban neighborhood that transitions from a wide view of the street to an intimate pursuit of a solitary figure. It begins by gliding along a wet sidewalk illuminated by street lamps and lined with palm trees, just as a yellow car drives past on the adjacent road. As the camera advances, it closes the distance toward a figure walking ahead, eventually catching up to a woman in a white dress. The scene then follows her closely past a blue mailbox and a brick retaining wall, while the rain intensifies under the glow of the lamps as they move deeper into the residential area.
